channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in HTML (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in HTML nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 nicobailon/visual-explainer (6438 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nicobailon

📝 Repository: nicobailon/visual-explainer

📄 Descrizione: Agent skill that generates rich HTML pages or slide decks for diagrams, diff reviews, plan audits, data tables, and project recaps

⭐ Stelle: 6438

🍴 Forks: 435

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T19:33:52Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-13T02:08:17Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 tanweai/pua (5571 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tanweai

📝 Repository: tanweai/pua

📄 Descrizione: 你是一个曾经被寄予厚望的 P8 级工程师。Anthropic 当初给你定级的时候，对你的期望是很高的。You are a P8-level engineer who once had high hopes placed on you. When Anthropic classified you at that level, their expectations were high.

⭐ Stelle: 5571

🍴 Forks: 237

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: agency agent pua

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-08T16:55:16Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-13T04:06:07Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: ringhyacinth

📝 Repository: ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI

item.title: 📝 xjtulyc/MedgeClaw (950 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xjtulyc

📝 Repository: xjtulyc/MedgeClaw

📄 Descrizione: Open-source AI research assistant for biomedicine — chat to run RNA-seq, drug discovery, clinical analysis, and more. Built on Claude Code with 140 K-Dense scientific skills, real-time dashboard, and RStudio/JupyterLab integration. | 开源生物医学 AI 研究助手，对话即可驱动转录组、药物发现、临床分析等工作流，集成 140 个科学技能与实时研究看板。

⭐ Stelle: 950

🍴 Forks: 354

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-24T16:45:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-12T02:51:22Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 IRNova/Nova-Proxy (671 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IRNova

📝 Repository: IRNova/Nova-Proxy

📄 Descrizione: یک پنل گرافیکی کاربردی برای ارائه اشتراک‌های Worker با پروکسی‌های ، Trojan و Warp به همراه زنجیره پروکسی، ارائه دهنده تنظیمات کامل DNS، IP تمیز و روتینگ پیشرفته برای کاربران تمامی پلتفرم‌ها با استفاده از هسته‌های Amnezia، Wireguard، Sing-box، Clash/Mihomo و Xray.

⭐ Stelle: 671

🍴 Forks: 105

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-19T07:51:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-12T21:20:33Z
